chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 521 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2362/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.2363/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. However, upon perusal of the record, it transpires that the disability certificate submitted by the Petitioner, available at page 11 of the case file, was issued in the year 2022. It is evident that the said certificate is not in conformity with the recent legislative amendments. In view of the foregoing, the instant Constitutional Petition stands dismissed. Nevertheless, the Petitioner is at liberty to obtain a fresh disability certificate from the competent Committee constituted under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, vide Amendment of 2019 and thereafter approach the respondents for redressal of his grievance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
